prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, design a high-affinity protein binder targeting 6 kDa early secretory antigenic target (ESAT-6 / EsxA) (bacterial secreted virulence factor (pore-forming)) expressed by Mycobacterium tuberculosis. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. provide a approach for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
